title: Repurposed Structures - Chef's Delight Compat
description: Adds Chefs and Cook houses to RS villages!
body:
With this datapack on, you can now find Chefs and Cooks in all RS villages except for Ocean village. Even the Crimson and Warped Villages will have these new houses! Start cooking!

**Forge:**
- Chef's Delight mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chefs-delight-forge

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

**Fabric/Quilt:**
- Chef's Delight mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chefs-delight-fabric

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5TWoVsKB/images/13d9e4c0f4984588324f3d6734d08e7fe0b33a6a.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5TWoVsKB/images/13d9e4c0f4984588324f3d6734d08e7fe0b33a6a.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
